validation_gates.reason: Repository, pinned main commit, same-path target, prior blob, two-file scope, non-goals, review branch, and no-merge boundary were resolved before mutation.

No overlapping open pull request or matching control-plane README modernization branch surfaced. Main advanced only through unrelated ADR-0006 work before the branch was created; the target and inspected control-plane evidence remained unchanged.

The existing control-plane root README was updated in place. The generated receipt uses the existing data/receipts/generated process-memory lane. No root, register authority, lifecycle phase, release path, or public route was created.

The complete v0.2 target was read; its machine-index purpose, authority boundary, accepted and excluded material, child-lane inventory, register rules, validation checklist, public-client prohibition, and rollback target were preserved or strengthened.
The first twelve H2 sections exactly match Directory Rules section 15: Purpose through Last reviewed.

Nine required root register files, two supplemental root YAML files, four child Markdown surfaces, current workflow/test wiring, and bounded population were inspected without treating path presence, empty entries, syntax checks, or green workflows as semantic or release authority.

The final README is UTF-8 with LF endings and a final newline; KFM metadata parses; one H1, forty headings without hierarchy jumps, five language-tagged fence pairs, balanced HTML, two Mermaid flowcharts, three alerts, and seven static badges passed deterministic source validation.

Fourteen explicit anchors are unique, all twelve legacy fragments are retained, forty-six internal fragment references resolve, and introduced repository-relative targets passed exact-path checks. Host rendering was not formally validated.
No private-key, common token, bearer credential, or harmful-precision pattern was introduced; the README preserves no-public-path and fail-closed handling.

GitHub returned blob 5d58d7e361671b9bf66deb97766cff021ab8ac2f on commit 4b96a68f93da82e12d2d872f06c8f07a1147d68e, matching the locally recomputed Git blob; artifact SHA-256 is aad95fd27f48a7c15aae1c3cda252ce6cd02ac5aac79e306f9ae48575e422c01.

Documentation/provenance-only change; no register body, schema, policy, validator, workflow, consumer, runtime, lifecycle, release, or public behavior changed. Repository-native pull-request workflows run separately.
Pull-request workflows were pending at receipt emission time. No CI success, human approval, merge readiness, release, or publication claim is made by this receipt.
Human review remains pending and separate from generation, validation, commit, merge, release, and publication.
